# Milestone 2 test fixtures

No downloaded or private capture is tracked here. Deterministic WAV fixtures
are generated in each test's temporary directory and removed afterwards.

| Filename / selector | Purpose | Origin | License | SHA-256 | Generated / inherited | Architecture | Expected behavior |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| `NeuralAmpModelerCore/example_models/wavenet_a1_standard.nam` | Core construction and A1-shape integration | Pinned NAM Core v0.5.3 repository | MIT (`NeuralAmpModelerCore/LICENSE`) | `C8D9711F32D032F8AD97CBC3C6706FAF9A505469E8279A9ABFBE123E824CA3F1` | Inherited | WaveNet A1 standard fixture | Loads through the Core registry and produces finite output |
| `NeuralAmpModelerCore/example_models/wavenet_a2_max.nam` | Strict A2-shape detection and Core construction | Generated by pinned NAM Core tooling and tracked upstream | MIT (`NeuralAmpModelerCore/LICENSE`) | `3D183A6B8F399F886FF3AB1F26AEB906C5916A84B18C159E89C85C17151B5C42` | Inherited/generated upstream | WaveNet A2 standard/max detector fixture | Strict detector accepts it; Core path constructs it where fixture weights are valid |
| generated `mono-*.wav` | PCM/float decode, sample-rate mismatch, resampling, long/empty/malformed behavior | Amphibia test generator | Amphibia project MIT | Computed and reported by the test | Generated | Mono IR | Valid variants load; invalid variants return the documented error |
| `AMPHIBIA_TEST_A1_NAM` | Optional released real A1 integration | Developer-supplied local file | Developer must verify permission; never committed | Test reports local hash | Local/discovered | Released A1 or legacy/custom | Test runs only when present; otherwise explicitly skipped |
| `AMPHIBIA_TEST_A2_NAM` | Optional released real A2 integration | Developer-supplied local file | Developer must verify permission; never committed | Test reports local hash | Local/discovered | Released A2 Nano or Standard | Test runs only when present; otherwise explicitly skipped |
| `AMPHIBIA_TEST_IR_WAV` | Optional developer IR render comparison | Developer-supplied local file | Developer must verify permission; never committed | Test reports local hash | Local/discovered | Mono WAV IR | Test runs only when present; otherwise explicitly skipped |

Environment-variable paths are read only at test runtime. Test output must not
print a private full path by default; it may print the basename and SHA-256.
Skipped local-fixture tests are listed separately from passed tests.
